name: Multi Launcher ‧ Home Screen
description: Multi Launcher: A Clean, Simple Android Launcher Built for Readability and Control. Looking for a launcher that ditches the clutter and keeps things easy? Multi Launcher is a powerful yet minimalist Android launcher that replaces tiny icons with clear, readable text buttons, making your phone easier to navigate. Whether you want a simple home screen, need large text for visibility, or prefer quick gesture-based actions, Multi Launcher gives you full control without overwhelming you with options.
